OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: Clinician_AtGlanceApplicantIP

childElements.name: GetAccountId
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "elementValueMap" : { "QueryId" : "=QUERY(\"Select AccountId from User where Id = '{0}'\",%UserId%)" }, "responseJSONPath" : "QueryId", "responseJSONNode" : "AccountId", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "SetValues5", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: ExternalUser
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "%ProfileName%==\"Core HC Customer Community Login User\" || %ProfileName%==\"Core HC Customer Community Plus User\"", "isIfElseBlock" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "ConditionalBlock1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: IP_DataService
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "AccountId" : "=%AccountId%", "InvokeFor" : "Applicant" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "Applications", "responseJSONNode" : "Applications", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "integrationProcedureKey" : "Clinician_AtGlanceDataServiceIP", "remoteOptions" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "disableChainable" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "IntegrationProcedureAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: SV_Interview
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "elementValueMap" : { "OnlineInterviewFeedbackProvided" : "=FILTER(LIST(%Applications:OnlineInterview%),'Status == \"Feedback Provided\"')", "OnlineInterviewScheduled" : "=FILTER(LIST(%Applications:OnlineInterview%),'Status == \"Scheduled\"')", "OfflineInterviewFeedbackProvided" : "=FILTER(LIST(%Applications:OfflineInterview%),'Status == \"Feedback Provided\"')", "OfflineInterviewScheduled" : "=FILTER(LIST(%Applications:OfflineInterview%),'Status == \"Scheduled\"')" }, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "SetValues3", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: LB_Applicants
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "loopList" : "Applications", "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "loopOutput" : { "ApplicationSubmitted" : "=IF((%Applications:StageName%==\"Submission\" || %Applications:StageName%==\"Recruiter Screen\" || %Applications:StageName%==\"Awaiting Intake Form\" || %Applications:StageName%==\"Presenting\" || %Applications:StageType% ==\"Interview\" || %Applications:StageName%==\"Offer\" || %Applications:StageName%==\"Term Sheet\" || %Applications:StageName%==\"Contracting\" || %Applications:StageName%==\"Placement\"),\"Complete\",\"In Progress\")", "RecruiterScreen" : "=IF((%Applications:StageName%==\"Recruiter Screen\" || %Applications:StageName%==\"Awaiting Intake Form\" || %Applications:StageName%==\"Presenting\" || %Applications:StageType% ==\"Interview\" || %Applications:StageName%==\"Offer\" || %Applications:StageName%==\"Term Sheet\" || %Applications:StageName%==\"Contracting\" || %Applications:StageName%==\"Placement\"),\"Complete\",\"In Progress\")", "ReferenceCheck" : "=IF(%Applications:ReferenceComplete%==\"Initiated\",\"Complete\",\"In Progress\")", "CandidatePresentation" : "=IF((%Applications:StageType% ==\"Interview\" || %Applications:StageName%==\"Offer\" || %Applications:StageName%==\"Term Sheet\" || %Applications:StageName%==\"Contracting\" || %Applications:StageName%==\"Placement\"),\"Complete\",IF(%Applications:StageName%==\"Presenting\",\"In Progress\",\"Not Started\"))", "VirtualInterview" : "=IF(ISNOTBLANK(%SV_Interview:OnlineInterviewFeedbackProvided%),\"Complete\",IF(ISNOTBLANK(%SV_Interview:OnlineInterviewScheduled%),\"In Progress\",\"Not Started\"))", "OnsiteInterview" : "=IF(ISNOTBLANK(%SV_Interview:OfflineInterviewFeedbackProvided%),\"Complete\",IF(ISNOTBLANK(%SV_Interview:OfflineInterviewScheduled%),\"In Progress\",\"Not Started\"))", "VerbalOffer" : "=IF((%Applications:StageName%==\"Term Sheet\" || %Applications:StageName%==\"Contracting\" || %Applications:StageName%==\"Placement\"),\"Complete\",IF(%Applications:StageName%==\"Offer\",\"In Progress\",\"Not Started\"))", "TermSheet" : "=IF((%Applications:StageName%==\"Contracting\" || %Applications:StageName%==\"Placement\"),\"Complete\",IF(%Applications:StageName%==\"Term Sheet\",\"In Progress\",\"Not Started\"))", "ContractSent" : "=IF(%SV_RecordCount:ContractSentDateCount% > 0,\"Complete\",\"In Progress\")", "OfferExpired" : "=IF(%SV_RecordCount:ExpiredContractCount% > 0,\"Complete\",\"In Progress\")", "Name" : "=%Applications:JobName%" }, "show" : null, "label" : "LoopBlock1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: SV_RecordCount
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "elementValueMap" : { "ExpiredContractCount" : "=COUNTQUERY( \"SELECT COUNT() FROM Contract WHERE AccountId = '{0}' AND Status = '{1}' AND RecordType.DeveloperName ='{2}' \" , %AccountId%, \"Expired\",\"Clinician\")", "ContractSentDateCount" : "=COUNTQUERY( \"SELECT COUNT() FROM Contract WHERE AccountId = '{0}' AND Sent_Date__c != null AND RecordType.DeveloperName ='{1}' \" , %AccountId%,\"Clinician\")" }, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "SetValues6", "disOnTplt" : false }

OmniIntegrationProcedure.propertySetConfig: { "linkToExternalObject" : "", "trackingCustomData" : { }, "includeAllActionsInResponse" : false, "columnsPropertyMap" : [ ], "relationshipFieldsMap" : [ ], "labelSingular" : "", "labelPlural" : "", "description" : "", "nameColumn" : "", "rollbackOnError" : false, "chainableQueriesLimit" : 50, "chainableDMLStatementsLimit" : null, "chainableCpuLimit" : 2000, "chainableHeapSizeLimit" : null, "chainableDMLRowsLimit" : null, "chainableQueryRowsLimit" : null, "chainableSoslQueriesLimit" : null, "chainableActualTimeLimit" : null, "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "queueableChainableQueriesLimit" : 120, "queueableChainableCpuLimit" : 40000, "queueableChainableHeapSizeLimit" : 6, "ttlMinutes" : 5, "mockResponseMap" : { } }
